title: helichrysum abietifolium subsp. gracilifolium
intro: Helichrysum abietifolium subsp. gracilifolium is a subspecies of the Helichrysum abietifolium plant, which is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds such as borneol and camphor, that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum abietifolium subsp. gracilifolium include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oil, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
